response.overview: Everything comes back around, and it's time for the 80's ladies to make their comeback! Check out six scenes featuring all natural babes with hairy bushes and hungry mouths! You'll see sexy redhead Lisa DeLeeuw get caught fucking a friend's husband! You'll see Vanessa Del Rio become the object of multiple men's fantasies! There's much more from these 80's Ladies, so grab a seat and prepare for a blast from the past!
response.title: 80's ladies
